name: Cota I Care Shampoo & Treatment Set (Refill)
pros: Highest Rakuten rating on this list (4.79★) with professional-grade formulation trusted by salons
Two large refill bottles (750ml + 750g) provide excellent volume for the price per use
Advanced conditioning complex targets damaged, color-treated, and aged hair effectively
cons: ¥14,570 is the highest price here—requires existing pump bottles or separate purchase
Primarily sold online; salon-exclusive positioning means limited in-store availability for foreigners
shortDescription: Professional salon-grade shampoo & treatment refill pair.
review: Cota I Care is the quality champion here, with formulations used in Japanese salons and a 4.79★ rating reflecting serious user devotion. The large refill bottles justify the premium price for those committed to consistent hair care. However, this is more suited to established Japan residents than newcomers due to pricing and the need for starter bottles. English product info is minimal; best purchased through Rakuten or recommended by your salon.
